title: armeria drummondii
intro: Armeria drummondii, also known as Drummond's sea thrift or Western sea thrift, is a low-growing, perennial plant species native to the western coast of North America. The plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful for treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Armeria drummondii include its ability to soothe and calm irritated skin, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and promote healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions, salves, and creams, and is also added to herbal teas and tinctures for its medicinal properties.
